seoTitle: Tullimbar vs Tullymorgan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tullimbar and Tullymorgan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tullimbar and Tullymorgan.
heading: Tullimbar vs Tullymorgan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tullimbar, New South Wales and Tullymorgan, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tullimbar has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tullymorgan (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tullimbar or Tullymorgan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tullimbar has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Tullymorgan scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tullimbar scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Tullymorgan scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tullimbar or Tullymorgan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tullimbar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
